elements.description: The capsule table has center1, center2, and radius fields. The return value is the fraction of translation that can be traveled before collision, or 1 if there is no hit.
elements.name: b2d.world.cast_mover

elements.description: Cast a ray.
elements.name: b2d.world.cast_ray

parameters.doc: optional query filter with category_bits, mask_bits, and optional group_index
parameters.name: filter

returnvalues.doc: array of hit tables with fixture, shape, point, normal, and fraction
returnvalues.name: hits

elements.brief: Cast a ray and collect hits.
elements.description: The translation is the ray displacement from origin. Result order is not guaranteed by Box2D.
elements.name: b2d.world.cast_ray

parameters.doc: optional maximum result count. Omit or pass 0 for unlimited results.
parameters.name: max_results

elements.brief: Cast a ray and return the closest hit.
elements.description: Cast a ray and return the closest hit.
elements.name: b2d.world.cast_ray_closest

parameters.doc: optional query filter with category_bits, mask_bits, and optional group_index
parameters.name: filter

returnvalues.doc: hit table with fixture, shape, point, normal, fraction, node_visits, and leaf_visits, or nil
returnvalues.name: hit

elements.brief: Cast a ray and return the closest hit.
elements.description: The translation is the ray displacement from origin.
elements.name: b2d.world.cast_ray_closest

returnvalues.doc: closest cast hit table with node_visits and leaf_visits, or nil on miss
returnvalues.name: hit

elements.description:
Uses Box2D v2 time-of-impact for fixture child shapes that support distance proxies.
Grid fixture children are skipped.
elements.name: b2d.world.cast_shape

parameters.doc: shape table using the same format as the shape field in b2d.body.create_fixture
parameters.name: shape

parameters.doc: optional query filter with category_bits, mask_bits, and optional group_index
parameters.name: filter

returnvalues.doc: array of hit tables with fixture, shape, point, normal, and fraction
returnvalues.name: hits

elements.brief: Cast a shape and collect hits.
elements.description: The shape table uses the same circle, capsule, segment, polygon, and box formats as b2d.body.create_shape. The translation is the shape displacement.
elements.name: b2d.world.cast_shape

parameters.doc: optional maximum result count. Omit or pass 0 for unlimited results.
parameters.name: max_results

elements.brief: Collide a mover capsule against the world.
elements.description: The capsule table has center1, center2, and radius fields. Plane result tables include shape, normal, offset, and hit.
elements.name: b2d.world.collide_mover

parameters.doc: optional maximum result count. Omit or pass 0 for unlimited results.
parameters.name: max_results

elements.description: Enable or disable continuous collision.
elements.name: b2d.world.enable_continuous

elements.description: Enable or disable world sleeping.
elements.name: b2d.world.enable_sleeping

elements.description: Enable or disable speculative collision.
elements.name: b2d.world.enable_speculative

elements.description: Enable or disable warm starting.
elements.name: b2d.world.enable_warm_starting

elements.description: The definition table requires position, radius, falloff, and impulse_per_length. It may also include mask_bits.
elements.name: b2d.world.explode

elements.brief: Get the number of awake bodies.
elements.description: Get the number of awake bodies.
elements.name: b2d.world.get_awake_body_count

elements.description: The returned table contains body_count, shape_count, contact_count, joint_count, island_count, stack_used, static_tree_height, tree_height, byte_count, task_count, and color_counts.
elements.name: b2d.world.get_counters

elements.description: Get world gravity.
elements.name: b2d.world.get_gravity

elements.description: Get the hit event threshold.
elements.name: b2d.world.get_hit_event_threshold

returnvalues.doc: hit event threshold in project units per second
returnvalues.name: threshold

elements.description: Get the maximum linear speed.
elements.name: b2d.world.get_maximum_linear_speed

returnvalues.doc: maximum linear speed in project units per second
returnvalues.name: speed

elements.description: The returned table contains Box2D timing fields including step, pairs, collide, solve, merge_islands, prepare_stages, solve_constraints, prepare_constraints, integrate_velocities, warm_start, solve_impulses, integrate_positions, relax_impulses, apply_restitution, store_impulses, split_islands, transforms, hit_events, refit, bullets, sleep_islands, and sensors.
elements.name: b2d.world.get_profile

elements.description: Get the restitution threshold.
elements.name: b2d.world.get_restitution_threshold

returnvalues.doc: restitution threshold in project units per second
returnvalues.name: threshold

elements.brief: Get whether continuous collision is enabled.
elements.description: Get whether continuous collision is enabled.
elements.name: b2d.world.is_continuous_enabled

returnvalues.doc: true if continuous collision is enabled
returnvalues.name: enabled

elements.brief: Check whether the world is locked.
elements.description:
The world is locked during callbacks and some simulation phases. Functions
marked as locked during callbacks cannot be called while this returns true.
elements.name: b2d.world.is_locked

returnvalues.doc: true if the world is locked
returnvalues.name: locked

elements.brief: Get whether world sleeping is enabled.
elements.description: Get whether world sleeping is enabled.
elements.name: b2d.world.is_sleeping_enabled

elements.brief: Check whether a world handle is valid.
elements.description: Check whether a world handle is valid.
elements.name: b2d.world.is_valid

returnvalues.doc: true if the world handle is valid
returnvalues.name: valid

elements.brief: Get whether warm starting is enabled.
elements.description: Get whether warm starting is enabled.
elements.name: b2d.world.is_warm_starting_enabled

returnvalues.doc: true if warm starting is enabled
returnvalues.name: enabled

parameters.doc: pushout velocity in project units per second
